response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: This video segment corresponds to Scene 1 (the intro talk segment) from the Reference JSON. No vocal music was performed in this segment. 2. JSON Usage: The lyrics provided for Scene 2 were discarded since the video ended right before the song began, switching instead to manual transcription and translation of the spoken banter and the final on-screen visual slide. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the spoken banter tightly to vocal frames, applying aggressive truncation to rapid back-and-forth speech. Added a final visual-only subtitle block for the on-screen ending slide. No closed-captioning tags or sound descriptions were used.

subtitles.original: かっこいいですね、これね！
subtitles.english: It looks so cool, doesn't it?!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much! We're so happy!

subtitles.original: そしてね、配信のコメントももちろん見えてますよー！
subtitles.english: And of course, we can see the streaming comments too!

subtitles.original: 見えてるよー！みんなー！
subtitles.english: We can see you! Hey everyone!

subtitles.original: もちろん、会場のみんなももちろん！
subtitles.english: And of course, everyone in the venue as well!

subtitles.original: 見えてるよー！可愛いー！
subtitles.english: We can see you! So cute!

subtitles.original: みんな素敵な気合の入った推し活ファッションしてきてくれて…
subtitles.english: Thank you all for dressing up in your wonderful...

subtitles.original: …推し活ファッションしてきてくれてありがとー！
subtitles.english: ...passionate fan outfits! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: 最高、最高ですよ！ / 最高ですね！
subtitles.english: This is the best, simply the best! / It really is!

subtitles.original: でも、ちょっぱなね、シャッフルメドレーでしたけど！
subtitles.english: But right off the bat, we had the shuffle medley!

subtitles.original: そうよー！ / 凄かったよね！ / 盛り上がったよね！
subtitles.english: That's right! It was amazing, wasn't it?! / It was so hyped!

subtitles.original: 外でもですね、なんとですね…ここまでで、えっ？
subtitles.english: But you know, surprisingly... up to this point, wait, what?

subtitles.original: 冒頭無料チラ見せが…
subtitles.english: The free sneak peek at the beginning is...

subtitles.original: 嘘でしょ！？ / 嘘、嘘！？
subtitles.english: No way?! / Are you lying?!

subtitles.original: そんなの嘘ぺこ！ / …終了となります。
subtitles.english: That's a lie, peko! / ...coming to an end.

subtitles.original: 嘘ってことで、ここからは… / 嘘ではないぺこですね。
subtitles.english: Since it's a 'lie', from here on... / So it's not a lie, peko...

subtitles.original: みんな観たいと思ってくれてると思うから…
subtitles.english: I'm sure everyone wants to keep watching...

subtitles.original: …概要欄に配信チケットのリンクがあるので！
subtitles.english: ...so there's a stream ticket link in the description!

subtitles.original: 今ポチポチっと買ってみてください！ / お願いします！
subtitles.english: Please go click and buy them now! / Please!

subtitles.original: 後悔させない！今日はすごい！
subtitles.english: We won't make you regret it! Today is going to be amazing!

subtitles.original: 今日は、Day 1よりもっと凄くなってますから！
subtitles.english: Today is going to be even more incredible than Day 1!

subtitles.original: もうぶち上げぶち上げで！
subtitles.english: We're going to hype it up completely!

subtitles.original: そう、Day 1とは違ったね、凄さ、盛り上がり。
subtitles.english: Exactly. A totally different level of excitement from Day 1.

subtitles.original: 君たちも今日超ぶち上がりなんで…
subtitles.english: Since you guys are also super hyped up today...

subtitles.original: …頑張って最後まで息切れしないようにぶち上がってください！
subtitles.english: ...do your best to keep rising and don't run out of breath!

subtitles.original: 最後までしっかり声出してね！ / 出してねー！
subtitles.english: Make sure to shout until the very end! / Raise your voices!

subtitles.original: そしてね、配信で楽しんでる人は…
subtitles.english: And for those enjoying the stream...

subtitles.original: …ハッシュタグ『ぎゅーるるん大作戦Day2』でいっぱい呟いてください！
subtitles.english: ...please tweet a lot with the hashtag #Kyu-ru-runGreatOpsDay2!

subtitles.original: はー…どきどきするね。
subtitles.english: Wow, my heart is pounding.

subtitles.original: そろそろいいですか？次の曲にいってもいいでしょうか？
subtitles.english: Is it about time? Shall we move on to the next song?

subtitles.original: いきましょう！ / はーい！
subtitles.english: Let's go! / Yes!

subtitles.original: なんと次の曲は、私からスタートさせていただきたいと…
subtitles.english: Unbelievably, the next song will start with me...

subtitles.original: …何が来るんでしょうか！ / 何だろう何だろう！ / いきましょう！
subtitles.english: ...What could it be?! / I wonder what it is! / Let's go!

subtitles.original: フルメドレー！
subtitles.english: Full medley!

subtitles.original: 無料パートは終了いたしました。ご視聴ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: The sneak peek part of the show has ended. Thank you for watching!
